# ADR Template

Use ADRs when a durable architecture decision must be recorded.

```markdown
# ADR-[number]: [Decision title]

## Status

Proposed | Accepted | Superseded | Rejected

## Context

[What problem, requirement, constraint, or conflict forced the decision?]

## Source facts

- [Fact with source]
- [Fact with source]

## Decision

[State the decision in one direct paragraph.]

## Options considered

| Option | Pros | Cons | Outcome |
|---|---|---|---|
| [Option] | [Pros] | [Cons] | selected/rejected/deferred |

## Consequences

### Positive

- [Consequence]

### Negative

- [Consequence]

### Neutral or operational

- [Consequence]

## Verification

[How will the decision be validated?]

## Follow-up

[Issues, PRs, docs, or future ADRs needed.]
```
